name: MONEI
description: MONEI — Spain-focused payment gateway supporting cards, Bizum, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other European payment methods.

seo.title: MONEI — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: MONEI: MONEI — Spain-focused payment gateway supporting cards, Bizum, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other European payment methods.

when_to_use: Bizum and card payment acceptance for Spanish e-commerce merchants
Apple Pay, Google Pay, and local Spanish method support via MONEI gateway
Recurring billing and subscription payments for Spain-based SaaS
PayPal and European wallet checkout for Spanish and Southern European merchants

pros: Strong Bizum and Spain local method coverage
Apple Pay, Google Pay supported natively
cons: Spain and Europe focus — no global reach
Smaller than Adyen or Stripe EU
review.verdict: Modern Spain-focused gateway — strong Bizum support makes it the pragmatic pick for Spanish merchants.
review.best_for: Spain and Europe merchants needing Bizum and local methods
review.not_for: Merchants outside EU or needing global multi-currency acquiring

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down
